evidence.claim: Expertise in Speech Recognition, scikit-learn, Search Backend, Model Adaptation, Vector Representations, BM25, Workflow Orchestration, GANs, NLP, Kubernetes, Python, Ranking Systems, Text Encoders, Data Science, Feature Engineering, Search & Discovery, Prompt Engineering, Haystack, Content Matching, and Recommendation Systems.
Led a team growth from 1 to 6 engineers during a matching layer overhaul project.
evidence.source_text: The team grew from just me to 6 engineers over the course of that work.

evidence.claim: Overhauled matching layer from hand-tuned heuristics to explicit modeling and evaluation.
evidence.source_text: Recent project was a complete overhaul of the matching layer; took it from a hand-tuned heuristic system to one with explicit modeling and evaluation.

evidence.claim: Shipped personalization infrastructure including offline experimentation and online A/B testing frameworks.
evidence.source_text: Shipped the personalization infrastructure... Designed the offline experimentation environment, the online A/B testing framework, and the feature-engineering pipeline

evidence.claim: Prefers shipping v1 in 6 weeks over perfect v2 in 6 months.
evidence.source_text: Strong preference for shipping real systems over research-only work; I'd rather have a working v1 in 6 weeks than a perfect v2 in 6 months.

evidence.claim: Learned from past mistakes including over-engineering and optimizing metrics that didn't correlate with online performance.
evidence.source_text: I've made the standard mistakes — over-engineering early, optimizing offline metrics that didn't move online numbers, building beautiful infrastructure for features that users didn't actually want — so I notice them faster now.

evidence.claim: Earned AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty certification.
evidence.source_text: Certifications: AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty (AWS, 2019)
